verses.text: Therefore give the more earnest heed, lest we let salvation slip; 'how shall we escape, if we neglect so great salvation?' Take heed. To drift from so great a gospel is fatal.
Therefore give the more earnest heed, lest we let salvation slip; 'how shall we escape, if we neglect so great salvation?' Take heed. To drift from so great a gospel is fatal.

Therefore give the more earnest heed, lest we let salvation slip; 'how shall we escape, if we neglect so great salvation?' Take heed. To drift from so great a gospel is fatal.
God put all things in subjection under man, though 'now we see not yet all things put under him.' The promise stands. Man's lost dominion will be restored in Christ.

God put all things in subjection under man, though 'now we see not yet all things put under him.' The promise stands. Man's lost dominion will be restored in Christ.
We see Jesus, made a little lower than the angels, crowned with glory, that He 'should taste death for every man.' The crowned sufferer. He stooped to death to lift us to glory.
It became God to make 'the captain of their salvation perfect through sufferings'; He is not ashamed to call us brethren. Our brother. Christ joins Himself to those He saves.
It became God to make 'the captain of their salvation perfect through sufferings'; He is not ashamed to call us brethren. Our brother. Christ joins Himself to those He saves.

It became God to make 'the captain of their salvation perfect through sufferings'; He is not ashamed to call us brethren. Our brother. Christ joins Himself to those He saves.
He took 'flesh and blood,' that through death He might 'destroy him that had the power of death,' and free those in bondage to fear. Death's destroyer. By dying He broke death's grip.
He took 'flesh and blood,' that through death He might 'destroy him that had the power of death,' and free those in bondage to fear. Death's destroyer. By dying He broke death's grip.
He took on Him the seed of Abraham, made like His brethren, a 'merciful and faithful high priest,' able to 'succour them that are tempted.' Tempted helper. He suffered, so He can aid the tempted.
